transitions.condition:
((doc.reason == "Field Visit" or (doc.reason == "Manual Punch" and doc.custom_note == "")) and
frappe.session.user == frappe.db.get_value(
        "Approver",
        frappe.db.get_list(
            "Approver",
            filters={
                "parent": doc.employee,
                "effective_from": ["<=", frappe.utils.now_datetime()],
                "parentfield": "custom_reporting_manager"
            },
            fields=["name"],
            order_by="effective_from desc",
            ignore_permissions=True,
            limit=1
        ),
        "user"
    )
)
